attributes.cardDescription: The markdown dialect Boxel reads and writes: CommonMark + GFM plus card directives, mermaid diagrams, KaTeX math, GFM alerts, footnotes, extended tables, and Monaco-highlighted code blocks.

cardInfo.name: Boxel Flavored Markdown (BFM)
cardInfo.summary: BFM reference: render surfaces, base syntax, :card/::card directives, mermaid, math ($...$ / $$...$$), alerts, footnotes, and code highlighting.
